Module wise Analysis

Each module carefully compare the code in VCUplus, CCU, Taiji/Chery/Maxus and identify difference and update Taiji - VCU Component difference - XC-CT China - Docupedia If any Architecture difference update in Taiji - VCU Architecture difference - XC-CT China - Docupedia
Module wise integration
Integrate module by module by changing Taiji to use CCU modules After test, remove code or repo from Taiji and point to CCU Deliver
